{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Mercy
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Lowgold trainee, heir, Truegold, favored daughter of the Monarch Akura Malice, chosen of Akura Malice, daughter of a ruler
| abilities = madra control, technique proficiency, shadow aura compatibility, combat with bows, staffs, flying swords, and puppet constructs, sacred arts, Underlord revelation
| affiliations = Akura clan, Skysworn squad, Akura family
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Akura Mercy Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura]] [[Mercy]] is a highly gifted individual and a prominent member of the [[Akura clan]]. As the daughter of the [[Monarch]] [[Akura Malice]], she is recognized as a favored child and a genius within her lineage. Her innate spiritual strength is so immense that it requires suppression to prevent it from overwhelming her spirit. She possesses various combat capabilities, including proficiency with striker techniques, the use of [[bloodline armor]], and mastery over specialized archery involving complex techniques and the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]]. Characterized by a joyful, bright, and sometimes clumsy demeanor, [[Mercy]] often presents a friendly appearance that contrasts with the perceived ruthlessness of her mother. Despite this lightheartedness, she carries significant responsibilities, having been tasked by the [[Heart Sage]] to assist in leading her clan during times of crisis. She is known to carry a large supply of medicinal elixirs and sacred herbs to aid others. Throughout her journey, she has navigated complex clan politics, faced assassination attempts, and eventually experienced profound spiritual revelations regarding her own identity and the power of her mother's legacy.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Akura Mercy]] is a slender girl with a long black ponytail and vivid purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Akura Mercy]] is a [[Lowgold]] trainee.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Akura Mercy]] identified herself by name.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Mercy]] is a child of the [[Akura clan]] with wide purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Akura Mercy]] is on a [[Skysworn squad]] with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A member of the [[Akura]] family and daughter of [[Akura Malice]], [[Mercy]] is a [[Truegold]] genius who outclasses her peers in [[shadow aura]] compatibility, technique proficiency, and [[madra]] control. Even by clan standards, she is considered a prodigy whose power is so immense that it must be suppressed to prevent burdening her spirit. Throughout her progression from [[Copper]] to [[Gold]], she set combat records using bows, staffs, flying swords, and puppet constructs, eventually discovering her [[Underlord revelation]]. During a confrontation, she intentionally lunged into [[Daji]]'s swords and utilized arrows embedded with techniques that burn both flesh and soul. Ultimately, [[Mercy]] sacrificed her bet with her mother to save [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]], departing with her personal belongings, her Book, and her bow while her physical skill and body remained sealed.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] is a young lady whom [[Cassias Arelius]] addresses.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] is a member of the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16">''Underlord'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]]'s arrows have a technique embedded in them that burns soul and flesh.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] intentionally lunged into [[Daji]]'s swords.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] is the daughter of [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] is considered a genius even by [[Akura clan]] standards.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]]'s ability is so strong she must have it suppressed to avoid burdening her spirit.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|At [[Copper]], [[Iron]], and [[Jade]], [[Akura Mercy]] outclasses her peers in [[madra]] control, technique proficiency, and [[shadow aura]] compatibility.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] sets records in combat with bows, staffs, flying swords, and puppet constructs.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]] declared [[Akura Mercy]] her heir.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] passed through [[Gold]] with ease.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] practices the [[sacred arts]] for the benefit of others.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] discovered her [[Underlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|As part of her departure, [[Akura Mercy]]'s body and physical skill were sealed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] was allowed to keep her personal belongings, her bow, and her Book.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] and [[Akura Malice]] made a bet regarding [[Mercy]]'s survival on her own.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] gave up her bet to save [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] was holding her bow and wearing broken green armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Mercy]] assured [[Lindon]] he would be safe in the dungeon.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Mercy]] is the favored daughter of the [[Monarch]] [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Mercy]] is instructed to watch the battle from inside a booth.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Mercy]] is of the [[Akura clan]] and a chosen of [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Mercy]] is the daughter of a ruler.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura]] [[Mercy's mother]] is the guardian of the lands around [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Akura Mercy]] is present.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Akura Mercy]] is a character who was weak after her time in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Akura Mercy]]'s eyes shimmer slightly before she calls her armor.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Emriss wants to speak to [[Akura Mercy]] about what it means to bring joy.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Mercy]] was the target of an assassination attempt involving [[Seishen Daji]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“I apologize, young lady. I am Cassias Arelius, and if you’ll forgive me, I’d say you must be Akura Mercy.”<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“Akura Mercy. You will watch from inside this room unless and until your turn comes. The battle will not touch you.”<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
